fails.why: 'use client' still at top of whole-page file; the only server piece (ProductLoaderContainer) is dead/unwired code
Product type still imported from global @/types/product (L9), not colocated with feature
useQuery + 'if (isLoading) return <Skeleton/>' early-return still present (L120); no useSuspenseQuery/Suspense
onChange sets search every keystroke (L153); no debounce/useDeferredValue anywhere
AddProductForm still does inline fetch('/api/products') in component (L294) instead of api/ layer
module-level mutable store + top-level useRef outside components (L88,L487); component sections not in types->hooks->useMemo->useCallback->render->export order
clickable <article onClick> card (L216) has no role=button, tabIndex, or keyboard handler
no ErrorBoundary wrapping the tree; only an inline query-error render, which is not an error boundary
entire filteredProducts mapped (L166) with no virtualization / react-virtual
modal focuses first button + Escape only; no Tab focus trap and no focus restore to trigger on close
